steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage first identifies why the adaptation was difficult: theater needs dialogue, but the original story lacked it and instead showed internal thoughts. The underlined sentence begins with “To transform...” and directly explains how Yamauchi solved this specific problem.

steps.title: Identify which choice correctly describes the function
steps.content: The sentence explains how Yamauchi converted the story's internal monologue into spoken dialogue. The remaining choices discuss casting, literary influence, and relative fame, concepts absent from the underlined sentence. That matches choice B — B is correct.
